description: A designed Department of Labor propaganda graphic. The left half is a full-height color photograph of President Donald Trump striding forward in a dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, against a blurred background of grass and the side of a presidential helicopter (Marine One) at the White House. A large white serif headline at the top reads 'Trust TRUMP!' ('Trust' in italic, 'TRUMP!' in bold capitals). The right half stacks four faux torn-newspaper clippings, each with a real news outlet logo and a positive headline about the administration's economic record: FOX BUSINESS - 'Trump administration prioritizes bolstering skilled trades workforce'; The Washington Times - 'Trump's aluminum and steel tariffs are working'; Bloomberg - 'No More Offshore. Startups Look to Spend and Hire in U.S. Due to Trump Tax Change.'; THE WALL STREET JOURNAL - 'Companies Tout More Investments, Orders From Trump's Tax Bill in Earnings Calls'. A small embossed seal sits at the bottom center. The visual style is a clean, high-contrast political-poster montage using the torn-paper headline-collage technique to borrow credibility from mainstream outlets. The propaganda technique is testimonial/authority-by-association (citing third-party press) combined with a personality-cult slogan ('Trust TRUMP!'). The target audience is the general public and pro-administration social-media followers, intended to project economic success and reinforce loyalty to the President.
notable_text: Trust TRUMP! | FOX BUSINESS: Trump administration prioritizes bolstering skilled trades workforce | The Washington Times: Trump's aluminum and steel tariffs are working | Bloomberg: No More Offshore. Startups Look to Spend and Hire in U.S. Due to Trump Tax Change. | THE WALL STREET JOURNAL: Companies Tout More Investments, Orders From Trump's Tax Bill in Earnings Calls
